role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified the absence of visible text and remained within the domain of script/language analysis.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline executed flawlessly. All agents adhered to their roles, provided concrete, image-grounded evidence, and correctly identified Japan as the most likely candidate. The tournament bracket logically narrowed the field to the correct winner.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Descriptions of stone walls, hedges, and roofs match the image perfectly.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Infrastructure details (gutters, poles) are correctly described.
